verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a single-pass TM Ig-like adhesion molecule on the sperm plasma membrane, essential for sperm-egg fusion. It has its own membrane anchor and is genuinely outer-leaflet exposed, but expression is restricted to the male germline (mature sperm). Per the rubric, germline/gamete-restricted surface display with its own anchor maps to contextual/tissue_restricted_surface rather than yes.
